overview: A professional food and vegetable general store website with 6 categories, 600 products, a shopping cart, detailed product pages, search, and intuitive navigation.
features: 6 product categories: Fresh Vegetables, Fresh Fruits, Dairy & Eggs, Bakery & Bread, Meat & Poultry, Pantry & Dry Goods
100 products per category (600 total) with names, prices, descriptions, and images
Shopping cart with add/remove, quantity controls, and running total
Product detail pages with hero image, full description, and related products
Search across all 600 products by name, description, and category
Breadcrumb navigation and back button on all pages
Category pages with sorting and pagination
